summary: Comprehensive testing of Realtouch Invoice email/password authentication completed. Backend APIs are fully functional, but frontend has intermittent redirect issues to external OAuth service.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent redirect to auth.emergentagent.com instead of showing local email/password form
ui_bugs.details: Page sometimes redirects to external OAuth service instead of displaying the implemented email/password login form. This appears to be a timing or routing issue.

passed_tests: Backend email/password signup API (/api/auth/signup) - creates user successfully
Backend email/password login API (/api/auth/login) - authenticates user successfully
Backend wrong password protection - correctly rejects invalid credentials
Backend duplicate email protection - correctly rejects duplicate signups
Login page loads with correct Realtouch Invoice branding
Login page shows email and password input fields
Login page shows Google OAuth button
Login page shows Sign Up toggle link
Form toggle between Sign In and Sign Up works correctly
Name field appears/disappears correctly when toggling forms
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix intermittent redirect issue in LoginPage.jsx - the page sometimes redirects to auth.emergentagent.com instead of showing the local email/password form. This prevents users from using the newly implemented email/password authentication. The backend APIs are working perfectly, but the frontend routing needs to be stabilized.

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (UI loads correctly but has redirect issues)
